spec.title: Total taps
spec.description: All NFC tag taps across all plants during the selected time range

spec.title: 📍 Altitude: Raw vs Filtered
spec.description: Raw vs filtered altitude over time — see how filtering smooths noisy barometer readings

spec.title: ↕️ Altitude Velocity
spec.description: Vertical velocity — positive = climbing, negative = descending

spec.title: 📙 Accel Z (vertical)
spec.description: Z-axis acceleration (vertical). ~-980 cm/s² at rest (gravity). Spikes indicate vertical movement.

spec.title: 📍 TOF Front + Altitude
spec.description: Time-of-Flight front sensor + altitude readings (raw and filtered)

spec.title: ⚙️ Motor Commands: FL vs RR
spec.description: Front-left vs rear-right motor commands — compare for motor imbalance

spec.title: 🚀 Thrust over time
spec.description: Total thrust output over time — reflects motor workload and flight intensity

spec.title: 🔧 Loop ΔT (firmware timing)
spec.description: Control loop execution time (µs) — shows firmware timing stability. Spikes = CPU pressure or missed cycles.

spec.title: Roll Angle
spec.description: Roll angle over time — left/right tilt

spec.title: Roll
spec.description: Current roll angle — left/right tilt

spec.title: Roll View
spec.description: When the drone tilts sideways — roll (front view)

spec.title: Pitch Angle
spec.description: Pitch angle over time — forward/backward tilt

spec.title: Pitch
spec.description: Current pitch angle — forward/backward tilt

spec.title: Pitch View
spec.description: Forward or backward tilt — pitch (side view)

spec.title: Yaw Angle
spec.description: Yaw angle over time — left/right rotation

spec.title: Yaw
spec.description: Current yaw angle — left/right rotation

spec.title: Yaw View
spec.description: Left or right rotation around center axis — yaw (top view)

spec.title: Expo Hall. Live Map
spec.description: Real expo hall floor plan photo with live plant moisture overlays

spec.title: 🚶 Aisle traffic
spec.description: Total people detected passing through the aisle near the booth

spec.title: 🏪 Booth visitors
spec.description: People who walked into the demo zone

spec.title: 📈 Aisle engagement rate
spec.description: % of people who saw the booth (entered or walked past) who actually stopped — measures booth attraction

spec.title: 📱 NFC conversion rate
spec.description: % of booth visitors who tapped the Dracaena NFC sticker at the booth

spec.expr:
100 * sum by(plant) (count_over_time(m5RFID_scan[$__range])) / ignoring(plant) group_left() (sum(count_over_time(m5PIR_count{zone="demo"}[$__range])) or vector(1))
or label_replace(vector(0), "plant", "Dracaena", "", "")
or label_replace(vector(0), "plant", "Money Tree", "", "")

spec.title: ⏱️ Avg engagement time
spec.description: Average time people spend engaged at the booth (in seconds). Longer = more interested!

spec.title: 🏆 Golden sticker winners
spec.description: Total unique golden sticker winners found during the selected time range

spec.title: 👟 Foot traffic vs engaged timeline
spec.description: foot traffic vs engaged visitors over time. See peaks when the booth gets busy.

spec.title: 🎯 Engagement funnel
spec.description: Full visitor journey: Aisle → Booth → NFC Tap → Golden Sticker. Shows drop-off at each conversion step.

spec.title: 📊 Engagement time trend
spec.description: How average dwell time evolves throughout the event — rising trend means visitors are more engaged over time

spec.title: 🏆 Winners by plant & prize
spec.description: Visual ranking of golden sticker winners by plant and prize. Auto-updates as new data arrives.

spec.title: Taps per plant
spec.description: Breakdown of NFC taps by plant name

spec.title: 🌡️ Temperature
spec.description: Current ambient temperature at the GrafanaCON26 booth

spec.title: 💧 Humidity
spec.description: Current relative humidity at the GrafanaCON26 booth

spec.title: 🌬️ Air Pressure
spec.description: Current atmospheric pressure at the booth

spec.title: 📈 Temperature & Humidity over time
spec.description: Historic ambient conditions at the GrafanaCON26 booth

spec.title: 📡 WiFi Signal
spec.description: WiFi RSSI of the M5Stack ENV III sensor. Higher (less negative) = stronger. -40 dBm = excellent.

spec.title: Tap activity timeline
spec.description: NFC tap events over time, split by plant

spec.title: 💦 Watering events
spec.description: Pump activation events per plant over time

spec.title: Ultrasonic Distance
spec.description: Distance measured by M5 ultrasonic sensor (HC-SR04 / M5Stack)

spec.title: Ultrasonic Distance
spec.description: Distance measured by M5 ultrasonic sensor (HC-SR04 / M5Stack)

spec.title: 🏅 Top tappers
spec.description: Most active NFC tag UIDs — the booth regulars! Ranked by total taps.

spec.expr: topk(10, (sum by(tag_uid) (count_over_time(m5RFID_scan[$__range])) * on(tag_uid) group_left(golden) label_replace(clamp_max(sum by(tag_uid) (count_over_time(m5RFID_golden[$__range])), 1), "golden", "🥇", "", "")) or label_replace(sum by(tag_uid) (count_over_time(m5RFID_scan[$__range])) unless on(tag_uid) sum by(tag_uid) (count_over_time(m5RFID_golden[$__range])), "golden", "", "", ""))

spec.title: ✈️ Flight Mode
spec.description: Current drone flight mode: INIT → AVERAGE → FLIGHT → PARKING → LOG → AUTO_LANDING

spec.title: 🚩 Altitude Flag
spec.description: Altitude sensor status flag

spec.title: 🏔️ Altitude (filtered)
spec.description: Current filtered altitude in cm from the barometric sensor

options.content:
🏆 GOLDEN STICKER WINNERS
🌿 See table below for all winners! ✦ ✨ TAP your NFC sticker NOW, you could be next!

spec.title: 🚀 Thrust
spec.description: Current total thrust output (motor command sum)

spec.title: ⏱️ Loop ΔT
spec.description: Control loop execution delta time (µs). Lower = more stable firmware timing.
